expanded_element.title: Himalayan Salt Therapy is Helpful for Allergies!
expanded_element.description: How does it work? The salt actually captures the allergies in the air and reduces moisture in the air allowing for a fresher breath of air in each inhale. The pink crystals in the salt lamps or a Himalayan salt room emit negative ions into the air which helps clear the air in what is known as “passive salt therapy.”
